programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: La nueva película de Reptar es decepcionante. Los bebés deberán convencer a su héroe para que mejore.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés van al cine y se sorprenden cuando Reptar pasa a ser el malo de la película. Tommy se rehúsa a creer que su héroe se ha vuelto malo y conduce a los bebés a una fantasía que entra a la película en busca de una explicación.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y Dil pelean por compartir a Firulais. Por eso, los bebés buscan una nueva mascota para Dil. Además, los bebés hacen una elección en la que Tommy y Fili son candidatos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats creen que un montón de bebés Dil crecerán de las plantas y se preparan para la invasión. Mientras los Rugrats juegan sin darse cuenta de que Angélica llegó, ella los espía a hurtadillas, y usa a Dil para hacerles bromas.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi le trae un divertido y suave juguete a Tommy llamado Goober para reemplazar a Reptar. Carlitos se encariña con Goober mientras que Tommy no. Cuando Dil destruye todos los juguetes de los Rugrats, la doctora Susie los arregla.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos moja la cama una noche, y Carlos se preocupa. Los Rugrats deciden ayudar a su amigo a despertarse seco. Los Rugrats juegan a ser exploradores, pero Dil se pierde y pasan todo su tiempo buscándolo.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos rasga su camisa, y Carlos le compra una nueva, lo que lleva a Carlitos a pensar que ya no es la misma persona. Cuando Didi oculta el tarro de galletas del abuelo, Angélica convence a los bebés de que lo busquen o morirá de hambre.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos tiene una pesadilla en la cual todos se encogen de tamaño, excepto Dil, el gigante. Angélica se gradúa de la escuela de protocolo y sus nuevos modales se ponen a prueba cuando Carlota recibe a un importante huésped.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy se siente excluido cuando cada uno recibe atención, y decide intentar la técnica de Angélica de fingir estar enfermo o lastimado. Los bebés deciden formar una banda de rock, cuando Angélica les explica qué es ser famosos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Susie entra al hospital por la extracción de sus amígdalas y sueña con regresar a casa con la ayuda de los bebés.

programme.title: Rugrats, aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de que el abuelo les explica a los bebés lo que significa el día de San Valentín y Angélica le dispara a Firulais con flechas de Cupido, los bebés quieren que Fluffy sea la novia de Firulais.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: La Tía Miriam olvida traerle un regalo de su viaje a Dil, así que los niños le consiguen uno en su patio. Entran en una fantasía por la que viajan a lugares fascinantes.

programme.title: Rugrats, aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Es otoño, la estación que favorece los cambios. Los bebés observan las hojas caídas, pero Angélica llega y les dice que las cosas más serias están por suceder.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy cree que el abuelo se fue por culpa de Reptar y por eso los bebés entierran todos los juguetes de Reptar. Cuando Tommy va a decírselo al abuelo, encuentra a Lou bailando salsa en una camilla de paramédicos.

programme.title: Rugrats, aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras el abuelo se enamora de una enfermera en la casa de retiro, Hugo lleva su robot gigante Reptar al festival y es invitado a Reptarlandia en París.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats imaginan a Angélica como una criatura gigante de la selva. Carlitos teme no ser un buen hermano mayor para Kimi.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés intentan liberar a Dil de una computadora. Phil y Lil se vuelven chefs. Angélica prueba un pastel.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica realiza una audición para que los bebés compitan por el papel de su hermano. Los bebés ayudan a Firulais con sus pesadillas. Kimi se encariña con una piñata en forma de burro y no quiere que nadie la rompa.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos tiene una nueva hermanastra y Angélica dice que a partir de ahora vivirá como Cenicienta, trabajando para las feas hermanastras.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y los bebés salvan a Hugo de un par de zapatos incómodos. El punto de vista de Dil y Firulais del desayuno en la casa de los Pickles. Los McNulty desafían a los Rugrats por el territorio en la lavandería.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica les dice a Carlitos y Kimi que hay niños aterradores en la guardería. Carlitos, Kimi y Tommy intentan descubrir el misterio de una escalera especial. Los bebés viajan al espacio para combatir a Darth Angélica.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos ve cambios por todas partes con Kira y Kimi en su casa. Los bebés descubren la magia verdadera tras bastidores de un espectáculo mágico. Lou trabaja como niñera.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Howard pierde su voz y los bebés van en busca de su lengua. Tommy intenta rescatar el biberón de Dil imitando las acciones de una de las historias de guerra de Lou. Kimi recibe más atención que Carlitos, por lo que él se pone celoso.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica y Susie compiten en un show de talentos. Además, Dil odia bañarse y Didi intenta descubrir por qué. Por otro lado, Carlitos teme estar perdiendo a sus amigos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés visitan una tienda para mejoras en el hogar. Angélica rompe el teléfono celular de Charlotte. Kimi oculta el reloj de Angélica.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés van a un almuerzo de negocios. Tommy le explica a Dil cómo funcionan las cosas de la casa. Cuando Carlitos teme que Kimi sea enviada de regreso a Japón, él y los otros bebés intentan hacer que su último día sea el mejor.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Fili está obsesionado con un programa de televisión. Tommy le explica sobre las cosas básicas del patio a Dil. Angélica presenta un programa de televisión.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: La tía T visita a los Carmichael para celebrar Kwanzaa. Al no haber ganado trofeos ni premios como el resto de su familia, Susie llega a la conclusión de que ella no es maravillosa y que no podrá celebrar.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats viajan al futuro y son diez años más grandes. Angélica aún los atormenta, Carlitos usa frenos, Tommy tiene cabello y Dil habla. Además, ahora van a la escuela y están a punto de asistir a su primer concierto para grandes.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kayla's madly in love with Levi, her baby's father, whom she's been dating for years. But this relationship is far from ordinary. A few months back, Kayla's 17-year-old sister accused Levi of taking advantage of her while sleeping.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Did Everett touch his girlfriend Michelle’s daughter? Her ex Robert says that his 7-year-old daughter said so. Everett will take a lie detector test to disprove it! Don’t miss these shocking results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Eugene and Kendra are tired of being harassed by Simone, his ex, who alleges he fathered her 3 children. While he does admit to sleeping with her, he denies the kids because he says she slept around! What will the DNA test results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Teenager Megan lives with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. Megan cannot attend school, find a job, or even eat without his OK! Can her aunt and Steve get through to her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Miranda says that her fiancée Charlie is guilty of cheating and taking drugs. Has he been cheating with Lisa, Miranda's worst enemy? He says that he stayed a couple of days at Lisa's house to make Miranda jealous! Can this relationship survive?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jon wants to start fresh and come clean to his fiancee about his secret affair. But first, his secret lover, Kirn, has some news for him! Then Racquel doesn't know why she's here, but when the babysitter arrives, she figures it out in a hurry!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Anita is ready to dump her husband for her ex-lover. Next Theresa is cheating on her fiancé with his brother! Later Kevin is here to ell his girlfriend's ex, Jermaine, to back off.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jamie is here today to confront her mother and they do indeed face off over Mom's bad behavior. Then Karla and Tiffany have a secret to confess to their respective husbands ... they're sleeping together!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The guests on today's show say they need to break free from their love triangles and fight for the one's they love.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Even though Shawn and Gina have been dating for over two months, Shawn has no idea that Gina is really a man. Next, Imani comes clean about her gender to both of her boyfriends!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Lanita's sister, Latoya, has been sleeping with her boyfriend, Mike! But the betrayal deepens and both sisters are in for a surprise. Next Jeny separated from her husband but they have still been sleeping together and now she wants him back.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: For the past 5 years, Trisha has been having a secret affair with her mother's boyfriend, Don! Next Daniel made a decision that he regrets because he's about to lose his fiancee forever.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Have you ever risked your relationship by revealing a secret? Have you questioned your lovers trust? Today's guests say they are tired of broken promises and they are here to face the truth and fight for their lovers.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Teneal y Richard cuentan historias diferentes, cada uno alegando que el otro no es apto para ser padre. La verdad se limitará a una prueba con el detector de mentiras, y los resultados serán impactantes.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Katrina cree que el novio de su hermana Kendra es un infiel y que tiene sexo con su mejor amiga, Nay-Nay. Después, John vuelve al escenario con algo sorprendente.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La familia de Jackie no confía en su novio cuando está con sus hijos, pero ella insiste en seguir con él. ¿Qué horrible verdad revelará la prueba del detector de mentiras de Shaqualla sobre su novio?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Gail quiere más emociones en su vida, por lo que ha estado acostándose con el novio de su mejor amiga. Después, Dave se entera de que su novia de los últimos 3 años tiene una aventura y está dispuesto a todo para recuperarla, incluso ponerse un sostén.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Cliff quiere que Anna, la mejor amiga de su novia, los deje en paz. Después, el marido de Kelly le ruega que lo acepte de regreso, pero Kelly no quiere porque ya está con el hermano de su marido.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Greg le contará a su novia, Deidra, que trabaja en secreto como prostituto gay. El novio de Madrina sigue siendo infiel a ella con su ex. Después, Ro-Ro tiene dos novias y hoy la obligarán a elegir a una de ellas.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Mehren dice que todo estaría bien con su novio, John, si su esposa los dejara en paz. ¡Greg ha venido a decirle a su novia que le ha sido infiel con su mejor amiga, Yolanda!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Nicole quiere recuperar a su novio, pero solamente si él termina su trío. Mesha ha estado enamorada del mejor amigo de su marido, Jamie, por cuatro años, pero no acepta un "No" como respuesta.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Angelo está aquí para contarle a su novia que es mujer. Luego, Mikey ha traído a su novia para contarle que le ha sido infiel. Después, Jennifer siente que debe decirle a su amante la verdad sobre su sexualidad

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jennifer se niega a dejar ir a su ex-novio, Marcus. Dice que lo recuperará a toda costa. Luego, Eddie dejó a Glinda y a su hijo de dos años hace 16 años. Hoy, Glinda le dice a Eddie que quiere que vuelva.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Jamie le ha sido infiel a su novio con una mujer! Después, Steve cree que su esposa ha sido infiel con otro hombre. A continuación, LaToya viene a causar un conflicto familiar. ¡Ella ha estado siendo infiel con la hermana de su novia!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Carla ha estado siendo infiel a su novio con su mejor amigo y su hermana! Después, Yvonne le contará a su amiga Marie que ha tenido relaciones sexuales con su novio. Mary Sue y su amante secreto, Cory, han venido a confrontar al novio de Mary Sue, Scott.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John pesa casi 700 libras y no podría ser más feliz. Su novia Kim le hace elegir entre ella y un sándwich de 3 metros de largo. Él elige el sándwich.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jen le contará a John que lo va a dejar por su amante secreto, Jerry, de 73 años. Después, Danika tiene una sorpresita para su prometido y se siente obligada a decirle que ella realmente es un hombre.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Ignacio ataca a Octavia y ella lo apuñala con una navaja. Sharon le dice a su médico que ella en realidad quiere cambiar y ser mejor para que la acepten. Marcela le dice a Diana que se va a divorciar de Max.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Maximiliano acepta el divorcio con Marcela. Pedro escucha la conversación entre Marfil y Camila y escucha sus planes de asesinarlo para quedarse con su fortuna. Fedora y Octavia se enfrentan por última vez.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Camelia se van de viaje en el yate pero se presenta en el muelle, Patricio. Camelia lo ve y se queda con la excusa de que dejó la cartera en el carro.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La avioneta dañada pasa por encima de Rosaura. Mairita llorando le pregunta a Anselmo si Rosaura va a regresar. Anselmo le dice que a lo mejor no. Rosaura ve la avioneta y comienza a gritar.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Panchita esconde la ropa de Luis Mario para verlo desnudo. Rosaura llega a darle la comida a Luis Mario y está totalmente desnudo. No sabe que Rosaura está con el.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le dice a Eduarda que se va a casar pero no con Eva. Ella trata de averiguar quién es la mujer pero él no se lo dice. El doctor va a ver a doña Cruz y les dice que la dejen dormir.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La policía va siguiendo a Karina. Rosaura le dice que se detenga pero ella no quiere y se estrellan. Luis Mario le dice a Eva que se va a casar para llevarle la contraria a Eduarda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le pide a Rosaura que se case con él y ella acepta. María Julia le da los últimos detalles a Karina para presentarla ante doña Cruz. Caridad recrimina a Eduarda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda y Eva se ponen de acuerdo para hacerle la vida imposible a Rosaura una vez que llegue a la casa. Panchita se les une. Luis Mario sigue pensando en Camelia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia llama a Luis Mario para oír su voz. Su plan es que cuando se canse de Patricio, volverá con Luis Mario porque sigue siendo su esposo. Luisana está llorando desesperada.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Claudia les dice que ahora menos que nunca cree en Karina, por no querer hacerse la prueba de ir con el chisme de doña Cruz. Samuel está con Claudia y tampoco cree en Karina y María Julia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda llama a Eva para comentarle un nuevo plan contra Rosaura y con la ayuda de Valeria. Valeria acepta provocar a Luis Mario y besarlo para provocar a Rosaura el día de la fiesta.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le suplica a Luis Mario que no la deje. Pero el está decidido a divorciarse. Gabriel le dice a Panchita que le diga señora a Rosaura y manda a Jimena a calmar los ánimos de Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura está llorando y llama a Luis Mario. Luis Mario regresa con Rosaura, pero como no está piensa que se fue para la casa de su papá. Eduarda le cuenta a Luisana lo que hizo con Rosaura.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp hatches a plan for a moonlit raid on the Marine vault, but Commander Jonathan is has a nasty surprise waiting for the pirates! Meanwhile, Sanji and Nami attempt to recover the waver.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The extreme arrogance of a Marine special investigator clears a path for Luffy and company to make their escape! Unfortunately, the Straw Hats still have to find their gold before returning to the high seas!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats may think they’re in the clear, but Commander Jonathan has one final trap waiting to ground the Going Merry! If Luffy’s crew is to escape, they’ll need a helping hand – or eight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates survive and near-death encounter with some mischievous sea monkeys only to land on a mysterious island where everything is much longer than it should be!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a loyal horse and his recently-returned master are assaulted by thugs, Luffy is drawn into a Davy Back Fight with the Foxy Pirates. The Straw Hat captain never backs down from a challenge, but this contest could cost him his crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Davy Back Fight begins with a treacherous Donut Race around Ling Ring Long Land! The Straw Hats square off against the Foxy Pirates in a battle to see who loses a crew member!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami uses her considerable skill as a navigator to put the Straw Hats on the verge of victory, but the captain of the Foxy Pirates has more than a few dirty tricks up his sleeve!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thanks to some foxy sabotage, Chopper has been lost to the enemy. The only hope for getting him back lies with Zoro and Sanji, but can they learn to work together in time to save the little reindeer?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Zoro take a beating at the hands of the Groggy Monsters, but they won’t give up the fight. With a little luck – and some teamwork – they’ll emerge victorious from round two of the Davy Back Fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Round three of the Davy Back Fight is a rip roaring roller derby! Chopper’s fate still hangs in the balance, and the Straw Hats have a huge problem: Luffy doesn’t know how to skate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Davy Back Fight sprints toward a sensational finish, the Straw Hats find themselves on the brink of defeat! Luffy’s finally managed to stay on his skates, but the Foxy Pirates are notorious cheaters!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats somehow manage to defeat the Foxy Pirates and win back Chopper, but Luffy eagerly accepts the challenge of a rematch! What is the captain thinking? And will his crew mutiny?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A devious game of dodge ball costs the Straw Hats their archaeologist. Now, they’ll have to win an unusual uphill race to reclaim Robin and avoid losing another crew member!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin and Chopper have both been lost to the Foxy Pirates, and there’s only one match remaining in the Davy Back Fight! Luffy’s got a plan to get his mates back, but failure would mean the end of the Straw Hats forever!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Captain Foxy go toe-to-toe in a brutal battle waged aboard a booby-trapped boat. Luffy is fighting for his crew, but Captain Foxy’s dirty tricks have him on the ropes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s epic battle with Captain Foxy reaches its riveting end, and a very old man with a very tall horse reunites with a face from very long ago.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Luffy and his mates lose their memory, Robin is the only Straw Hat who can remember their adventures together. Can she recover their recollections before the crew splits up?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin tries to hold the crew together while unraveling the mystery of the missing memories. Meanwhile, Nami and Zoro flashback to painful moments from their pasts.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats finally discover the culprit behind their memory loss, but they’ve got bigger problems. The mysterious thief is determined to pit Zoro and Luffy against each other!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Luffy fight to the death, Nami attempts to orchestrate an uprising, and Sanji discovers he’s willing to kick a kid in order to get his memories back!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats finally regain their memories, but a much larger challenge looms on the horizon. The mysterious thief is about to transform into something even more powerful!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A terrible storm leads to another run in with the devious Captain Foxy! When Luffy makes the dangerous decision to help his old foe, it could spell disaster for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates must survive another outrageous battle aboard Captain Foxy’s booby-trapped boat, and even if they survive, something far worse awaits them!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats take time out to help a group of hungry castaways, but trouble looms on the horizon. An icy marine adversary is out to track down Robin!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Usopp work feverishly to save Robin from her icy tomb, and Luffy looks to settle the score with Admiral Aokiji in a man-to-man fight to the finish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An encounter with a giant swimming frog leads to a close call with a seafaring train! Next up for the Straw Hats: drop anchor at a town full of water and seek out a shipwright!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Usopp, and Nami take a wild ride through Water Seven in search of a shipwright. Meanwhile, Chopper and Robin get separated during their quest to find a bookstore!

programme.desc: A serial sniper terrorizes the entire D.C. metro area by discreetly targeting random victims out in public and in plain sight.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In 1990, a serial killer terrorizes the University of Florida's campus, killing five students in under four days; the Gainesville Ripper leaves behind a crime scene where all the victims have been stabbed but the females have been posed like dolls.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In New Jersey four bodies are found dismembered, bagged, and thrown in roadside garbage cans; the "Last Call Killer" hunted his victims openly in piano bars but no one suspected he could be hiding in plain sight, working as a local nurse.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Dallas police discover three women murdered with their eyes surgically removed; police believe they have a deranged doctor on the loose until two rookie cops find themselves on the trail of a man with a talent for taxidermy and a hatred for women.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer hijacks the highways of Sacramento as several women are found strangled with their clothing cut into precise but odd patterns; a survivor leads police to a sports car driving deviant posing as a good samaritan to poach potential victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When the Hillside Stranglers are caught police realize they still have another serial killer running rampant in Los Angeles; he tortures and toys with his model victims while keeping pieces of their jewelry as he snaps their last photo ever.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Texas authorities have a killer riding the rails and leaving a literal trail of bread crumbs after eating at victims' tables; when more murders are linked, the FBI names a Most Wanted suspect and a national manhunt for The Railroad Killer ensues.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Minnesota police hunt for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness; no one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the summer of 1976, the NYPD are chasing a man shooting at couples in parked cars with a gigantic, .44 caliber handgun; he taunts the city with terrifying letters until police get a lead about a suspect who has shot a neighbor's dog.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the 1990's, New York is on edge as a killer leaves coded clues at crime scenes and declares his compulsion to choose victims by their birth signs.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A rash of young men goes missing around Chicago during the 1970s; when bodies start washing up in the river, a pattern emerges; a small piece of evidence leads police to the home of a model citizen, where his furnace puts the suspect in the hot seat.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Police find a string of murdered women in shallow graves in very remote areas of the Alaskan wilderness; after months of searching, police zero in on a local family man living a double life that no one suspects.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Numerous women are found dead by the side of the road with a unique ligature that looks like a dog collar and leash; detectives are stumped until a 17-year-old girl manages an escape from a vicious kidnapper, leading police to a serial killer.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: The I-5 corridor in California is taken over by a brazen bandit who terrorizes the highway with a blitz of assaults and murders; the only clue to the killer's identity is a specific athletic tape used to bind his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer taunts Wichita, Kan., for decades by sending brazen letters and taking credit for horrific kills; at the introduction of the computer era, the killer gets sloppy and accidentally leaves a digital clue.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Dinosaurs Inside And Out
programme.desc: When dinosaur fossils were first pulled from the ground, the appearance of the creatures was anyone's guess. But from Argentina to Wyoming, great discoveries and bold new thinking suggest these ancient creatures were more complex than once imagined.

programme.title: Dinosaurs Inside And Out

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre que ha sido destrozado por un contenedor de basura apenas se aferra a la vida; Al mismo tiempo, una monja anciana y una prostituta ebria y gritando entran a la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico de un resort debe tratar a un hombre gravemente herido por la hélice de un barco; y la sala de emergencias se detiene cuando las computadoras y la enfermera jefe no funcionan.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El hospital se cierra cuando una enfermera recibe un disparo en la sala de emergencias; una novia regresa de su boda con un estado mental alterado inexplicable.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El lifting de una mujer sale terriblemente mal; el repentino cambio de personalidad del capellán de un hospital desconcierta al personal de urgencias; los síntomas de una mujer embarazada que ponen en peligro su vida necesitan un tratamiento urgente.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico de urgencias herido organiza un espectáculo para detener los arrebatos violentos de un paciente; el corazón de un hombre falla cuando su hija y su novia pelean; en Nochebuena, la familia y el médico de una víctima de quemaduras oran por milagros

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una pila de paneles de yeso se derrumba sobre un niño de 12 años. Cuando una mujer griega se queja de dolor abdominal, la Dra. Angelique Campen está decidida a descubrir la causa, a pesar de que otros médicos no han encontrado nada.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente se presenta con un fuerte dolor de cabeza, luego le salen hematomas en las piernas y su médico no tiene idea por qué.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Demente Criminal

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: A visit from Adam's free-spirited mother puts Jennifer's patience to the test and teaches Russell an embarrassing lesson about 'art'. Meanwhile, Jeff and Audrey find themselves enjoying alternative forms of entertainment.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff makes plans to take Audrey away for the weekend to a fancy hotel, even though they’ll have to sit through a time share presentation to get a great deal.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Adam suggests that Jen do some freelance graphic design work for the company but Russell isn't crazy about the idea.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff's drive to be labeled an 'optimal male' on his life-insurance physical leads him to some extreme behavior, while Adam's over-friendliness with an ex-girlfriend unsettles Jennifer.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Russell puts on a show to impress his father when he comes to town, but both he and Adam learn the meaning of a parent's tough love. Meanwhile, an 'accident' in their apartment forces Adam and Jennifer to invade Audrey and Jeff's bathroom.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jennifer and Adam attempt to practice fiscal responsibility as they consider buying their apartment. Audrey and Jeff offer to write their letter of recommendation, but end up making matters worse when they have a run-in with the landlady.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Russell reluctantly agrees to host a photo shoot in his apartment for Audrey's magazine, with the hope of landing a date with a hot model. Adam steps in to play the groom in Audrey's wedding-themed shoot.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey realize that the names on their baby list are also the names of women that Russell has slept with. Adam becomes a cycling enthusiast after Jennifer suggests they start riding bikes in the park.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Feeling lonely after her cat dies, Liz looks for a sperm donor. When Timmy's intellect and innocence don't attract his crush, he tries his hand at playing 'big dog.' Adam rips the vintage wedding dress that Jennifer's family sent her.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Dave's estranged father, Lamar (Kevin Pollak), arrives in town eager to reconnect, his son finally learns the truth about his disappearance 30 years prior. Also, Marty struggles to fire an underperforming employee.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Calvin pushes Marty to move up the opening of their new business to get a valuable celebrity endorsement from D.L. Hughley.

programme.title: The Neighborhood

programme.title: The Neighborhood

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: After learning Dave and Gemma occasionally see a couples therapist to keep their marriage strong, Tina decides she and Calvin should do the same, to Calvin's consternation.

programme.title: The Neighborhood

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Calvin and Dave embark on their first road trip together to a classic car show, only to hit a roadblock that tests their friendship. Also, while their husbands are away, Tina and Gemma decide to take home repairs at the Butlers' into their own hands.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Gemma's troublemaking sister, Brittany (Deborah Baker Jr.), returns, claiming she's turned over a new leaf, thanks to a surprising new business venture.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Malcolm surprises Calvin and Tina when he brings home a new motorcycle, while Dave and Gemma aim to rev up their social life with a spontaneous trip to Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Calvin discovers a member of the community plans to sell to greedy developers, he vows to find a buyer closer to home instead. However, the Butlers and Johnsons soon realize that the dilapidated property will require more work than they expected.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Gemma's phone is stolen, Dave and Calvin team up to get it back, only to have their mission take an unexpected turn. Also, Malcolm and Marty move into their new house.

programme.title: The Neighborhood

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales detienen a un hombre problemático con antecedentes de fastidiar a la gente en la calle. Los agentes detienen a un sospechoso con dinero en su zapato. La policía trata de descifrar la historia detrás de un disturbio doméstico.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre en una bicicleta decide huir de los oficiales tras estar bebiendo en la calle. Una mujer no está segura de cómo terminó en un vehículo robado. Descubren a una pareja fumando metanfetamina en frente de un niño en un vehículo sospechoso.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre intenta huir de la policía porque no ha pagado manutención, pero termina detenido por otras razones. Una mujer llena de ira casi atropella a su novia. Un sospechoso trata de ocultar algo a los oficiales, pero sus nervios lo delatan.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre furioso y sin control ruega que le disparen. Una mujer borracha se enoja después de ser arrestada por agresión doméstica. Agentes tratan de entender la historia detrás de una disputa en una familia disfuncional.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un intruso en propiedad privada armado, usa a un cachorro como escudo. Una mujer drogada hace un escándalo, dañando casas y gente. Una señora amante de los gatos reporta a sus vecinos por ruidosos.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se atrapa a un sospechoso que intenta huir escondiéndose en un lugar obvio. Él dispara cuando cree que su perro corre peligro. Le llaman a paramédicos para una mujer angustiada y su pareja catatónica.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer llora cuando es detenida por la policía. Durante una parada sospechosa, un pasajero nervioso ayuda a los oficiales. Un sospechoso culpa a un extraño por lo que hay en su billetera.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre al volante de un auto robado causa una loca persecución. La mamá de dos hombres llama a la policía cuando uno amenaza al otro con un cuchillo. Una pareja joven se contradice con la policía.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un adolescente huye después de ser llevado al médico. Durante una parada un sospechoso hace todo lo posible para guardar silencio. Una tía enojada no puede desalojar al sobrino y novia embarazada.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre corre y vuelve a casa a darse una ducha para que no le sigan. Un hombre agresivo viola una orden de alejamiento. Una pareja casada se contradice durante un retén.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía persigue a ladrones de autos por la ciudad y hacia los arbustos. Una amistad se acaba cuando la policía interroga. Un hombre insiste que él deja a indigentes guardar sus cosas en su auto.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer que estaba dormida recibe a los agentes con mal humor. La policía responde a informes de un sospechoso y descubre mucho más. Una joven intenta evadir la cárcel haciendo promesas.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso se arriesga en un barranco cuando ya no hay salida. Una inspección de auto convierte un paseo familiar en viaje a la cárcel. La policía examina un altercado entre padre e hijo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se logra detener a un ladrón de autos por deseos de fama. Para conseguir la atención de un conductor despistado, la policía se ve obligada a desactivar su auto. Da un nombre falso para evadir arresto.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor temerario trata de evitar un retén, pero en vez termina superándose a sí mismo. Cuando se interroga un grupo peculiar rápidamente se culpan entre sí. Oficiales excavan para llegar a fondo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Presunto ladrón de cobre se hace el tonto cuando los policías lo alcanzan. Un ciclista nervioso intenta una maniobra resbalosa. La violencia doméstica de una pareja termina en pelea en la calle.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Ladrones que se pasean en cuatrimotor robado causan una persecución difícil. Una pareja con etiquetas vencidas acaba a punto de pistola. Un motociclista da el nombre de su hermano para evitar la cárcel

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una pareja trata de escapar durante una tormenta. Un conductor resiste a los agentes de manera anticuada. La policía encuentra a un sospechoso sudando en una calle oscura que está para dar miedo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una inspección de cierre en el parque descubre a una pareja joven en un baño portátil. Un hombre peleonero se niega a rendirse. Una fuerte discusión entre amigos llama la atención de la policía.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un joven privilegiado piensa que puede mandar a la policía. Un delincuente conocido escapa suficiente tiempo causando mucho daño. Hay muchos sentimientos cuando una mamá enfrenta a su hijo esposado.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre con muchas órdenes de arresto pelea por no ir a cárcel. Un conductor desesperado intenta ocultar su crimen a último momento. Un joven debe trabajar después de cometer un error.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La manera respetuosa de un infractor asombra a los agentes. Un oficial sigue sus instintos al ver actividad sospechosa en una gasolinera. Una discusión durante la cena acaba con llamada a la policía.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Arriving on New Athos for an overnight visit, Teyla and Dr. Keller discover the entire settlement abandoned and their own lives in jeopardy from the Bola Kai, a fierce warrior tribe. The pair must avoid capture until Atlantis sends a search party.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: With still no trace of the Athosians, Teyla requests an off-world visit to meet with a seer, Davos, who may be able to help her find her people. Meanwhile on Atlantis, Agent Woolsey arrives to observe and review Col. Carter.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After working for countless hours on the Replicator coding, Dr. McKay reluctantly admits that he needs help from his sister, Jeanie. But she goes missing, McKay travels to Earth determined to find her and uncover who is behind the kidnapping.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: As Dr. McKay struggles to figure out why the stargate has been inoperable, a mysterious probe plunges into the city. A sweep of the probe offers McKay a shocking glimpse of nanite code before his diagnostic program crashes and all the data is lost.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Armed with the means to track Replicator ships, the Atlantis team strives to eliminate the Replicators once and for all. Now, the team rushes to evacuate those human settlements in the path of the advancing Replicator forces.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The Atlantis long-range sensors detect the signal of a subspace tracking device familiar to Dr. McKay. The team follows to signal to a damaged hive ship drifting in space. Amidst the ship’s records, they discover references to a secret Wraith base.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When an alarm sounds, McKay suspects that a highly infectious disease has triggered the city’s self-protection system. With vital systems affected, the Atlantis team finds themselves trapped in various sections of the city with no way out.

programme.title: Stargate
programme.desc: When an ancient Egyptian artifact is discovered, two men unlock its secret power as a portal through time and space.

programme.title: Stargate Origins: Catherine
programme.desc: 'Stargate Origins' follows Catherine Langford, whose father, archeologist Paul Langford, discovered the eponymous Stargate in 1928, when Catherine was a young girl. Young Catherine explores the mysteries of the Stargate in an attempt to save Earth.

programme.title: Stargate: Continuum
programme.desc: In this adrenaline-driven, action-adventure, members of SG-1 find themselves returning to a world where their history has been dramatically altered and the Stargate program never existed! Richard Dean Anderson, Beau Bridges, and Michael Shanks star.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Cameron helps Donna pack up. Bos makes his famous chili. Joe helps Haley recover a memorable keepsake. Gordon and Donna fight.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Donna celebrates a milestone with her closest allies. Cameron contemplates saying goodbye. Joe confronts an uncertain future.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: The 1980s computing boom through the eyes of a visionary, an engineer and a prodigy as they chart the changing culture in Texas' Silicon Prairie.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: After surviving a visit from IBM, Joe's team must overcome internal differences and begin the technical feat of building the new machine.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.desc: Pilgrim leads the hunt for near-fatally wounded Sunny. The Widow confronts her inner demons in an attempt to restore her Gift.

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe’s old flame Clay comes to town after he and his partners steal a valuable urn that is guarded by a demon, putting Prue in jeopardy after Clay gets Phoebe to ask Prue to help sell the urn.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper is almost killed by a beast, she notices a strange transformation she begins to make – all similar traits to her attacker. Meanwhile, Phoebe works as Prue’s assistant and tries to help a family reunite after a premonition.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: On the eve of another Friday the 13th, the sisters learn of a demon (guest star Billy Drago) who kills witches after discovering their deepest fears. Now, he’s after Prue (Shannen Doherty) since discovering her fear of water.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue (Shannen Doherty) tries to help a young boy (guest star David Netter), who’s received his mother’s witch powers after two thugs (guest stars Brad Tatum and Will Stewart) kidnap him to use his powers for their evil gain.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: An earthquake unearths a shadowy evil Woogy who promptly takes over the gasman on the Halliwell premises who promptly takes over Phoebe, who as a child most feared the Woogyman the girls’ grandma always talked about.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A dangerous mortal (guest star Alex McArthur) uses a crystal sword to suck powers out of people and targets Prue (Shannen Doherty) as his next victim. To help combat him, Prue casts a spell to strengthen her powers, only it ends up cloning her twice.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After a run in with a demon who’s responsible for the death of the sisters’ mother, Prue, Piper and Phoebe are transported back to the 1970’s after casting a spell to try to prevent her death and their loss of powers.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue (Shannen Doherty) tries to help Brendan (guest star Michael Weatherly) who’s two brothers (guest stars David Kriegel and Nick Kokotakis) are evil warlocks that attempt to convert him as well, forming the Evil Charmed Ones.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After the Halliwell sisters witness the kidnapping of Piper’s (Holly Marie Combs) friend (guest star Maureen Muldoon) son (guest star Scott Tera), they discover it’s the work of the Grimlocks, demons who take the sight away from young boys.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper leaves town for a convention, Prue and Phoebe discover a long-dead convict has been brought to life as a ghost and is murdering people who had anything to do with his conviction.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.desc: After repeated, unsuccessful attempts at trying to get to the Charmed Ones, Rodriguez (guest star Carlos Gomez) is aided by time sorcerer Tempus Fugit (guest star David Carradine) who traps the Halliwells in a time loop.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: On their first anniversary of becoming witches, the sisters face a cloven-hoofed demon called Abraxas, that steals the Book of Shadows and undoes the spells they've cast, releasing old vanquished enemies of the Charmed Ones.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.desc: Christine tries to behave maturely when Richard brings "new" Christine to breakfast with Ritchie so they can get to know each other.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: A trip to L.A. reaffirms Melanie, Joy and Victoria's experience that it is a shallow, youth-obsessed city, and Elka pitches Mario Lopez on shooting "Extra" in Cleveland.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Eggman fails a test to get his license for evil, he uses Orbot as his front. Knuckles suffers amnesia. When he discovers that he's the last of his kind, he sets out to find a foster family.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic stumbles upon an ancient mech suit. It makes him more powerful. Eggman builds a giant new robot to defeat Sonic. He programs it to know everything about the Blue Blur, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: The gang is suspicious when Froglodyte Og comes to the surface. Knuckles is upset when he wins a lamp in a raffle and it dawns on him that he doesn't have a home in which to keep it.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy suspects that his new neighbor is really the thing he fears most… a giant pickle. --- Jimmy and Beezy vie to join the Rodeo Clown's 'Cool Clown Club'.

programme.desc: Kail invites Devoin on her podcast. Jade decides to get plastic surgery in Miami, so Briana visits to coach her through her anxiety. Bar goes to court for his outstanding DUI charges. Leah's twins turn 11.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade gets plastic surgery but her recovery turns dangerous, and Briana tries to help her as the situation escalates. Ashley juggles even more when she finds out she has to suddenly move. Leah gets news that will help Ali be more independent.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade's recovery gets even rockier when tensions rise between Sean and her parents. Ashley and Bar make a tough wedding decision as he faces another court date. Leah plans a birthday party for Addie, hoping Jeremy can make it.

programme.desc: Jade plans to fly home, but Briana tries to convince her to come back to Orlando with her instead. Kail reveals heartbreaking challenges around a recent medical diagnosis. When Addie struggles with online learning, Leah makes a tough decision.

programme.desc: Jade recovers at Briana's house, but has to make a hard decision about her family. Leah tries to balance Ali and Aleeah's unique needs. Kail juggles three different coparenting relationships. Bar starts college while Ashley plans a birthday surprise.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Ashley and Bar grapple racist backlash. Kloie's behavior wedges a divide between Jade and Sean. Briana travels for surgery, but returns to something shocking. Leah meets her doctor in hopes of getting answers about the lump on her breast.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade's career is moving forward, but her relationship with Sean begins to slip. While Ashley prepares to receive her Associate's Degree, Bar's schoolwork hits a road black. As Leah's second ultrasound approaches, she braces for the results.

programme.desc: Kail faces a court battle with Chris. Bar's DUI resurfaces & threatens to ruin Ashley's graduation party. Leah finds out if she needs surgery on her tumor. After meeting with a lawyer about Luis' parental rights, Briana is left with some hard choices.

programme.desc: Kail files a lawsuit against Briana while Leah meets a new love interest. Sean hits a crossroads in his sobriety as Jade struggles in their relationship. After a low key wedding, Ashley and Bar hit the rocks and she considers ending things for good.

programme.desc: Briana goes on Kail's ex's podcast leading to explosive consequences. Kloie has a medical emergency & Jade must navigate solo with Sean gone, Ashley contemplates the divorce while Bar visits his mom in Ohio. Leah goes on a date but gets a shocking call.

programme.desc: After Kloie's dental surgery, Christy drops a bomb on Jade. Briana goes on a family vacation but tensions between her and Javi boil over. Ashley navigates living with her ex after Bar returns from Ohio. Leah gets to know Jaylan.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail uncovers a secret Vee & Javi have been keeping. Leah introduces Jaylan to the girls. Jade tries to create stability for Kloie, who is struggling in Sean's absence. Briana & Devoin use lessons from therapy to rebuild their co-parenting relationship.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade & Kloie reunite with Sean after 3 months apart. Stella has a medical emergency that Briana is forced to navigate without Luis. Bar's past threatens reconnection. Jaylan has a chance to move closer to Leah, but it's not what either of them hoped for.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Bernardo Elizondo, un hacendado mayor y adinerado, se enamora de Libia, una joven humilde que enfrenta la furia de sus hermanos porque ella es vista como una prostituta por la gente del pueblo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan quiere marcharse lejos con sus hermanos para que Libia se olvide de ese amor, pero una verdad golpea el honor de la familia Reyes, mientras Bernardo esconde que es un hombre casado.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Al enterarse de la muerte y el engaño de Elizondo, Libia va a la hacienda, se siente desamparada y no aguanta más al ser fuertemente humillada por Gabriela, la viuda de Bernardo, y sus hijas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan, Óscar y Franco reconocen el cadáver de su hermana y acusan al hacendado como el asesino. Norma Elizondo se opone a las decisiones de su madre y desafía los deseos de su esposo Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes consiguen la dirección de la hacienda de los Elizondo y van a reclamar justicia. Gabriela se siente agobiada y toma vacaciones en su casa de la Florida, viaja con Norma y Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena y Sara Elizondo están cautivadas con los empleados que recibe Eva en la hacienda. Juan pelea con Franco por culpa de Rosario, la cantante del bar, y por oponerse a su venganza.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar propone una manera de desquitarse de los Elizondo sin mancharse las manos de sangre. Gabriela regresa sin avisar y entrevista a los trabajadores, Juan no puede ocultar su rabia y dolor.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan acepta seducir a las Elizondo, sus hermanos se preocupan por su actitud al conocer a Norma. Gabriela presiona a su hija para que comience a corresponderle a Fernando como esposa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena cita a Franco en un parque y se besan, él quiere ir más allá. Norma y Fernando celebran su primer aniversario de matrimonio en el bar, él se deslumbra con la presentación de Rosario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La invitación a un rodeo en la hacienda es la ocasión perfecta para que Juan consiga la atención de Norma. Rosario termina con Franco para protegerlo y le prohíbe su entrada al bar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Encuentran a Franco malherido, Jimena sufre al enterarse de la gravedad de uno de los obreros. Norma habla a solas con Juan y le ofrece ayuda, él demuestra su soberbia y también su dignidad.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma atropella con su caballo a Juan y se siente culpable, se desatan los celos de Fernando. Franco es trasladado a un hospital, Gabriela le asegura a los Reyes que ella pagará los gastos.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The stress of the Race begins to take its toll when a Double U-Turn is revealed, and one Team struggles to consume a local delicacy while others become acquainted with Swiss hospitality.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Everyone is a suspect when a passenger goes missing about the Pacific Princess. Meanwhile, when Julie's high-school friend boards the ship with her son, they learn an important lesson after running into the woman's father and another passenger.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A carnival entrepreneur is approached on the Pacific Princess by a woman who knows a shocking secret about his past. Meanwhile, a comedy duo with a bear act competes for the affection of the same woman.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: On a Hong Kong cruise: a senator romances a woman until he learns the nature of her visit; two brothers date Julie and Vicki; a compulsive shopper is offered $25,000 by her husband (Herb Edelman) if she'll resist temptation during the trip.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An international fugitive finds love when he meets a beautiful woman with a secret, while a divorcee meets an intriguing man who conceals his identity from her and Isaac.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A rich widow comes face to face with her estranged sister, who's working on the ship as a made and whose boyfriend the wealthy woman stole and married 40 years earlier. Meanwhile, a childless couple hatches a plan to become parents.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A man bound by alimony wants to make sure his ex (Michelle Phillips) goes through with her marriage; Julie's Aunt Sylvia and her pal Betsy try to interest a publisher in Betsy's memoirs.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac's budding relationship with a new crew member becomes complicated when Gopher tells him to fire her. Meanwhile, a congressman and his wife bring their daughter aboard the Pacific Princess after receiving letters threatening her young life.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A gambling cruise for charity proves a chancy thing for a teacher (McLean Stevenson), two honeymooners (Shea Farrell, Leah Ayres), and the drive chairwoman (Celeste Holm). Richard Jaeckel, Antony Ponzini, Jo Ann Pflug, Gavin MacLeod.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Captain Stubing hires a handsome new photographer who draws the attention of two sisters who were visiting Doc and Gopher. Then, a young man is shocked to meet his mother's (Lee Meriwether) new boyfriend, who is the same age as him.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An inventor's zealousness jeopardizes his chance for romance and a man's double identity upsets Julie and a passenger.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A boy who thinks his grandmother (Glynis Johns) is terminally ill will do anything to ensure her happiness; a man (Ed Begley Jr.) who's uncomfortable around women falls in love with a mermaid (Mary Crosby).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A bevy of beauties, including a stunning new cruise director, board the Pacific Princess for an all-woman voyage to Alaska.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares…and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West fights off an unprovoked knife-wielding assailant and then meets a beautiful blonde named Marie.

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House
